visualization.description: Scatter plot with churn score on the X-axis, satisfaction score on the Y-axis, CLTV encoded as point size, and customer status encoded as color.

effect.description: This interaction highlights specific risk categories based on brushing, filtering points into subsequent views.

visualization.description: Box plot showing churn score distributions across gender categories.

effect.description: Drilling down into specific demographics for further analysis in detail views.

visualization.description: Parallel coordinates chart to show cluster patterns across customer attributes.

views.components: Enable dropdown menus to refine clusters.

visualization.description: Heatmap summarizing churn risk factors into categorical risk groups using color shading.

outputs.path: The user browses View 1 at the [Overview] level and learns about the overall distribution of churn likelihood based on satisfaction scores, churn scores, CLTV, and customer status. Next, the user brushes and selects risk categories in View 1 for filtering purposes, impacting View 2's box plot distribution across demographics. Then the user clicks specific demographic categories in View 2 and gains detailed insights into specific clusters in View 3 at the [Detail] level using a parallel coordinates chart. Lastly, View 4 at the [Insight] level displays aggregated findings on churn risk factors grouped into actionable risk categories in a heatmap.
